case_title: MICHAEL WALLS et al VS. CORNELIUS J DESPANIE

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WALLS, MICHAEL ELLIS, DEBBIE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-14-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, EXCEPT PLAINTIFF DEBBIE ELLIS WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE ON THE CROSS--COMPLAINT FOR CROSS--DEFENDANT DEBBIE ELLIS, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (FEE FOR SERVICE $25.00) SERVED FEB-14-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ELLIS, DEBBIE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-21-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-14-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, EXCEPT PLAINTIFF DEBBIE ELLIS WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE ON THE CROSS--COMPLAINT FOR CROSS--DEFENDANT DEBBIE ELLIS, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-30-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT ON THE PLAINTIFFS CLAIM. NO COSTS AWARDED ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALLS, MICHAEL ELLIS, DEBBIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DESPANIE, CORNELIUS J STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
